notes: Vendor hint domain (sacreyandsacreydentistry.com) 301-redirects to sacreydds.com, which corroborates the record's exact address (328 Anderson Blvd, Geneva, IL 60134) and phone (630-232-0659). Homepage and attempted /meet-the-doctors and /about-us pages did not show a doctor roster or a careers/hiring page. Third-party sources (Doctors Network) name Dr. Elizabeth Sacrey among ~3 providers, but this is not shown on the practice's own site pages checked, so the roster remains unverified from a primary source.

Vendor hint domain genevaildental.com ('Geneva Dental Care,' which the search index shows once had an 'Our Staff' page) failed to load on 3 separate attempts (root URL and /our-staff.html, both http and www variants) — connection refused, site appears dead. No other corroborated website found for Kenneth P. Trch, DDS, P.C. Third-party directories (Yelp, Healthgrades, WebMD, Vitals) confirm the address/phone but are not the practice's own site and cannot satisfy the corroboration rule.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Bicknell, described on the practice's own site as having run the practice for 40 years in the Fox Valley area; record name is 'Bicknell Daniel K DMD', consistent with the site branding.
notes: Corroborated by exact address match ('1881 S Randall Rd Ste D Geneva, IL 60134') and exact phone match on the /our-locations page. Homepage names Dr. Bicknell as owner/principal dentist but does not give full credentials or list additional named dentists by name (site mentions 'doctors and other professionals' generically). No careers/hiring page found.

public_practice_name: Brush and Restore – Dentistry of Geneva
owner_operator_stated: Current site states the owner is Dr. Alli Wolski (DMD, Midwestern University), who took over the practice from retired former owner Dr. Gary Krueger; it now operates as 'Brush and Restore – Dentistry of Geneva.' No entity named 'Advocate Dental Geneva, LLC' appears anywhere on the corroborated site or in general web search.
notes: Address (112 N. Fourth St., Geneva, IL 60134) and phone ((630) 232-4076) are corroborated exactly on the /contact page of brushandrestore.com. But the site's practice name and stated ownership ('Brush and Restore,' owner Dr. Alli Wolski, successor to retired Dr. Gary Krueger) do not match the record's named entity 'ADVOCATE DENTAL GENEVA, LLC,' and that LLC name does not appear on the site or in search results (an even earlier business at the address, 'Geneva Family Dentistry,' is separately listed closed on Yelp). Treated as an ownership/successor conflict since the currently operating named entity differs from the record's named entity. No careers/hiring page found; appears to be a single-location independent practice (no multi-location/DSO signal found).

public_practice_name: Family Dental Care of Glen Ellyn
notes: Corroborated by exact address (658 Roosevelt Rd, Glen Ellyn, IL 60137) and phone ((630) 858-0216) shown on the homepage. Site is a multi-location group brand 'Family Dental Care' (also serves St. Charles/Campton Hills). The Careers page routes to a Greenhouse job board hosted under 'elitedentalpartnersllc' (Elite Dental Partners LLC), indicating this location is part of a multi-location dental group/DSO rollup rather than a standalone independent practice. Confirmed one open 'Dental Assistant' posting scoped to the Glen Ellyn location via the Greenhouse listing. Homepage patient-review content names 'Dr. Beck' but with no credentials; a full doctor roster page was not reached within budget.

owner_operator_stated: The original named entity 'Robert M. Jourdan, D.D.S., P.C.' is listed as CLOSED on Yelp. The address and phone are now operated by 'Always Great Smiles,' a 4-dentist group (Pecora, Langner, Zaremba, Davies); Dr. Jourdan does not appear on the practice's current doctor roster page.
notes: Searched the record's phone '(630) 469-0296' and address '586 Duane St'; per Yelp, the originally named entity 'ROBERT M JOURDAN DDS PC' is CLOSED. Pecora DDS MS, Jennifer J. Langner DDS ABDSM, David W. Zaremba DDS, Joseph T. Davies DMD), confirmed on the practice's own 'Meet the Doctors' page.
